signal_items.name: P2_001 Vol term-structure state machine signal
signal_items.rule: Stress if VIX9D/VIX3M > 1.05 OR VIX/VIX3M > 1.02 OR VVIX > 115 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.18; recovery if VIX9D/VIX3M < 0.95 AND VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago AND QQQ 20-day momentum > 0; use TQQQ when recovery or QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA, otherwise 40% TQQQ when not stressed

rows.trading_basis: 종가 신호 -> 당일 종가/애프터장 대체 체결가

signal_items.name: P2_002 Damage recovery state machine signal
signal_items.rule: Panic if QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.20 OR TQQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.55 OR VIX > 35; repaired if QQQ 20-day momentum > 0 AND QQQ close > QQQ 50-day SMA AND VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago; strong if QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA AND QQQ 252-day drawdown > -0.10 AND VIX < 28; map panic-not-repaired to 0%, repaired-not-strong to 50%, strong to 100%, otherwise 25% TQQQ

rows.trading_basis: 종가 신호 -> 당일 종가/애프터장 대체 체결가

signal_items.name: P2_003 Crash reentry timer signal
signal_items.rule: Arm after VIX > 35 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.18; when armed and VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago AND QQQ 10-day momentum > 0 AND QQQ close > QQQ 20-day SMA, set a 63-session TQQQ window; inside that window use 50% TQQQ if VIX9D > 1.15 * VIX3M, otherwise 100%; outside use 25% TQQQ if QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA else 0%

signal_items.name: P2_004 Volatility surface score signal
signal_items.rule: Set score from five binary conditions: VIX9D/VIX3M < 0.95, VIX/VIX6M < 0.90, VVIX 252-day percentile < 0.70, VXN < VIX + 8, QQQ 252-day drawdown > -0.12; exposure is 100% if score >= 0.75, 50% if score >= 0.45, otherwise 0%

signal_items.name: P2_005 Breadth recovery ladder signal
signal_items.rule: Count QQQ, XLK, SOXX, SPY assets with positive 63-day momentum and positive 20-day momentum; stress if VIX > 30 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.20; if stress and recovery count < 3 use defense, if 63-day count >= 3 and 20-day count >= 3 use 100% TQQQ, if recovery count >= 3 use 50% TQQQ, otherwise 0%

signal_items.name: P2_006 Variance drag allocator signal
signal_items.rule: Compute drag_score = QQQ 63-day momentum - 0.5 * (QQQ 21-day annualized realized volatility squared); subtract 0.15 if VIX9D > 1.05 * VIX3M; use 100% TQQQ if drag_score > 0.10, 50% if > 0.02, otherwise defense

rule_semantics.rule_interpretation_note: 이 항목은 백테스트 재현을 위한 규칙 설명이며 투자 조언이나 실거래 지시가 아닙니다.
rule_semantics.trading_basis_label: 종가 신호 -> 당일 종가/애프터장 대체 체결가

signal_items.name: TQQQ_VOTE_2_OF_4 Strict 2-of-4 vote signal
signal_items.rule: Risk-on if at least 2 of 4 are true: QQQ close > QQQ 200-day SMA; QQQ 126-day ROC > 0; VIX < 25; LQD 63-day ROC > SHY 63-day ROC

rows.trading_basis: 종가 신호 -> 당일 종가/애프터장 대체 체결가

selection_export.format_choice_rationale: Canonical JSON keeps executable rule specs, required symbols, signal graphs, exposure, timing, cost, benchmark, and source-tier boundaries without embedding performance metrics.

strategies.entry_rule: 진입/노출 ON: 장마감 후 계산한 신호 조건이 참이면 다음 거래일 시가 기준으로 TQQQ 노출을 적용합니다.

signals.name: P2_001 Vol term-structure state machine signal
signals.rule: Stress if VIX9D/VIX3M > 1.05 OR VIX/VIX3M > 1.02 OR VVIX > 115 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.18; recovery if VIX9D/VIX3M < 0.95 AND VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago AND QQQ 20-day momentum > 0; use TQQQ when recovery or QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA, otherwise 40% TQQQ when not stressed

signals.name: P2_002 Damage recovery state machine signal
signals.rule: Panic if QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.20 OR TQQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.55 OR VIX > 35; repaired if QQQ 20-day momentum > 0 AND QQQ close > QQQ 50-day SMA AND VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago; strong if QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA AND QQQ 252-day drawdown > -0.10 AND VIX < 28; map panic-not-repaired to 0%, repaired-not-strong to 50%, strong to 100%, otherwise 25% TQQQ

signals.name: P2_003 Crash reentry timer signal
signals.rule: Arm after VIX > 35 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.18; when armed and VIX is lower than 10 sessions ago AND QQQ 10-day momentum > 0 AND QQQ close > QQQ 20-day SMA, set a 63-session TQQQ window; inside that window use 50% TQQQ if VIX9D > 1.15 * VIX3M, otherwise 100%; outside use 25% TQQQ if QQQ close > QQQ 100-day SMA else 0%

signals.name: P2_003 Crash reentry timer signal

signals.name: P2_004 Volatility surface score signal
signals.rule: Set score from five binary conditions: VIX9D/VIX3M < 0.95, VIX/VIX6M < 0.90, VVIX 252-day percentile < 0.70, VXN < VIX + 8, QQQ 252-day drawdown > -0.12; exposure is 100% if score >= 0.75, 50% if score >= 0.45, otherwise 0%

signals.name: P2_005 Breadth recovery ladder signal
signals.rule: Count QQQ, XLK, SOXX, SPY assets with positive 63-day momentum and positive 20-day momentum; stress if VIX > 30 OR QQQ 252-day drawdown < -0.20; if stress and recovery count < 3 use defense, if 63-day count >= 3 and 20-day count >= 3 use 100% TQQQ, if recovery count >= 3 use 50% TQQQ, otherwise 0%

codex_derived_assumption: TQQQ is treated as the exploratory traded instrument for a QQQ/Nasdaq signal.
Signal is evaluated after close and any later execution model is next-session open.
Cost placeholder uses commission 0 and 0.05% slippage per exposure change.
Later run tier is exploratory_unofficial and cannot support final review.
Lookback/window is Codex-derived: 200 trading days for QQQ trend; 252 trading days for volatility percentile.
Threshold is Codex-derived: QQQ close above 200-day moving average and VIX/VXN below rolling 75th percentile.
Daily after-close timing is a proposed rewrite, not a source-confirmed fact.
Rule closure Codex-derived assumption: use 252 trading days for QQQ time-series momentum.
Rule closure Codex-derived assumption: threshold is QQQ 252-trading-day total return > 0.
Rule closure Codex-derived assumption: exposure is 1.0 when true and 0.0 otherwise.

static_html_contract.external_network_scope: strategy dispatch worker and latest result JSON only

normalization_contract.primary_benchmark_rule: QQQ if present, else first benchmark

strategies.entry_rule: 신호를 장마감 후 확인하고 조건이 참이면 당일 종가 또는 애프터장 대체 체결가 기준으로 TQQQ 노출 테스트를 요청합니다.
strategies.exit_rule: 신호를 장마감 후 확인하고 조건이 거짓이면 당일 종가 또는 애프터장 대체 체결가 기준으로 TQQQ 노출 해제 테스트를 요청합니다.
strategies.notes: 탐색용 출처 등급은 별도 실행 단계에서 결정합니다. 이 파일은 브라우저 구조 검증과 테스트 요청 준비에만 씁니다.

signals.name: QQQ 200일 추세
signals.rule: QQQ close > QQQ 200-day simple moving average

strategies.strategy_name: QQQ 200일선 확인 후 TQQQ 테스트 아이디어

strategy_import_v1.source_tier_note: exploratory source tier는 별도 실행 단계에서 결정합니다.
